review_text: Came here to give our new van a shakedown, have previously stayed at  a few other parks locally wow what a difference. The new managers were very accommodating especially with late notice for booking in peak period. Toilets and showers were dated as with most parks but surprisingly very clean. The real treat was the beautifully manicured grounds. I've never been to a park that has managed to keep grass growing better than my own home. Keep up the great work .

Budget Ensuite Cabin
You get what you pay for and I wanted a cheaper place to call home for a few nights in Albany and it was great, everything was what we expected for the price and as described on the website, thanks for having us !

What a pleasant surprise this place was! Cabins clean and well equipped with everything you could need, the showers had us all impressed; clean and brilliant water pressure. Perfect stop for weary travellers, just enough out of town to be very convenient but quiet enough too. Fairy lights at the barbecue area are a lovely touch, barbecues got cleaned daily. The owners have only taken the place up 8 weeks ago and the difference they have made should be commended. Minor issue with one of the playground bouncers was no sooner mentioned in passing by my daughter than being fixed the next day! Never come across such an approachable and responsive management crew. Loved it, we will be back again and again.

If anyone is coming to Albany we totally recommend staying at the Acclaim Albany Holiday Park.

It is a really well laid out caravan park.  Very close to Albany, only 9 minutes drive to town centre.

Our cabin was perfect size for our family of 3 (fits family of 4 well) and had everything we needed as well as comfy beds.

Great location right across from toilets and showers,  playground and camp kitchen.

The park is very well maintained and clean, and awesome water pressure in the showers!

The management and staff are very friendly and helpful.

Great price too.  We will definitely be back, we are already planning our next trip here
Fantastic place to call home away from home. Facilities were pristine, staff were amazing and it's only minutes from the town centre. That's why we stay here every year !!! PET FRIENDLY !!!
All good!🤷‍♂️😃

Thankyou once again for another enjoyable weekend.
This is our groups second year staying here and we are already talking and planning staying again for our group.
On arrival we were welcomed in a friendly and helpful manner.
We book the self contained cabins and being we ride motorcycles and have limited space, its great knowing the cabins have everything you need, towels, soap, shampoo, tea, coffee, milk and everything you need.
We used the BBQ area 2 nights and everything worked well and found other guests very friendly making it enjoyable socialising.
Overall another great stay and we look forward to being back next year, thankyou 😊

Great park, we booked a powered site, plenty off room,clean amenities grounds are keep nice  very quite
Servo & coles are very close,we meet nice people in the park
We would stay again

Pleasant stay, large sites, ablutions old but clean, play area for kids, exercise area for dogs. Not all sites level. Owners very accommodating to book a group of 6 powered sites together for a long weekend when we only booked a few weeks before.  Be aware there is no dump point here - it is situated at the information bay 600m up the road. Supermarket and fuel station close by. Would be happy to stay again.

Thank you Albany! You have many angles to you that we love. And a fabulous hinterland for enjoyable exploring. Cafes and restaurants are numerous. Thank you Albany Holiday Park! We have thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. The relief park Managers were very good. Big sites. Flat sites. Not too many rules and regulations! Location was good....Coles, Service station, Maccas, Caravan Shop, Pharmacy. A special congratulations to the  Groundsman who works consistently hard to present the lawns and gardens nicely. A rural outlook. Quiet.
The Bicentennial year has extra events scheduled regularly. Good options for every style of traveller.
New owners are the worst,  dont bother going here!
Absolutely the worst,  dont bother going here. You'll have a terrible time with the owners of this place. Anywhere but here.

Very disappointing experience.
The manager/owner was extremely rude and aggressive on the phone for no reason, showing a complete lack of basic manners and professionalism.
Bathrooms are absolutely disgusting.

Great place to stay. Friendly visitors and clean amenities. The playground is fun for the kids and the camp kitchen and bbq facilities are handy when you feel like barbecuing  up some snags. There is a laundry and the prices are lower than a laundromat. Trish, Sean and staff are friendly and always helpful.
Grand et Bien équipé, Wifi, cuisines, bbq, tout est présent. C'est un peu comme un hôtel pour campers. Loin du centre mais très calme.
Great caravan park they where so nice to fit us in as we had car problems.  The amenities  are great the park is well kept. We'll be back if down this way again .

I can’t believe they are coming at night and checking how many people live in the tent so disgusting. There is not kitchen no services and customer service is sneaking in people’s tent to check how many kids are living there to charge them. Don’t recommend this location to any and.
They had my card number saved and charged me extra for a little baby for living inside my tent and I don’t know if she takes any space. We are only one night and will leave early morning and won’t visit this location whatsoever.

We stayed for three nights at a powered camp site. Overall, the place was ok: the toilets and shower building is very old and not well maintained. Toilets and showers were not cleaned properly and toilet paper was not replaced often enough. Also, located next to a busy road which can be quite noisy if you’re close.

Management was absolutely horrible. The lady was very childish and unprofessional, same as the man although he was also aggressive and uneducated. We simply was being courteous to other drivers and they were unhappy we made way for them, they proceeded to follow us and wanted us to park our car In overflow in which we respected but needed time to unpack the car, which they said we could. They continued to change their own rules. We were yelled and abused at. Simply rude, disrespectful and uneducated. As they are supposedly new management, we can certainly tell, please go educate yourselves on simple manners, professionalism and communication. If I could give this zero stars, I would. Also, It’s free to be kind.

Such lovely friendly managers, nothing was too much trouble for them. We have stayed here a couple of times with our dogs who are welcomed without a million rules and regulations!
The cabins are basic but everything was very clean and tidy.
Kiva pieni leirintäalue .Mökki kaipasi remonttia ja siivousta.
Friendly staff and the sites are a good size. Ideally located within close proximity to shopping centres. Amenities are clean , camp kitchen and book library is huge. Lovely I'll be back.

I’ve park with spacious sites, friendly staff, well looked after, good camp kitchen and amenities.  No dump point but there is one just along the road so not a problem, has power and water and the sites are grassy.  It’s out of the main town which is nice but there is a Coles and an IGA fairly close by if you need to get groceries but don’t fancy going to town.

Was friendly and easy to find - just located before you get to Albany but still close enough to the town centre- room was clean and presentable - managed to access Netflix on the smart tv - which I wasn’t expecting - lovely holiday thank you

Great customer service very friendly and helpful great location easy to find both myself and partner stayed in the cabin had everything we needed for our stay and waking up to the peace and quiet hearing the birds singing was a delight definitely will stay again

Didn't mind our stay. Booked in here to get our car fixed.
Reception was a bit 'nonchalant'. Wouldn't hurt her to smile a bit!
Also think if you dropped the price by $10 pn you would do better.
In all, for this trip, it suited us.
Great caravan park friendly staff clean and tidy amenities great grassed area to walk your dog we had a quiet and relaxing stay

What amazing Management. Place was very well maintained and clean. The rooms were a little dated but still all amenities were extremely clean.

The Management were super friendly, helpful and nothing seemed too difficult. They made me want to return. Genuinely a great place to stay.

Stayed here for the Albany 7’s competition and it was just what we needed. Cabin is on the smaller side of things but that didn’t phase us. Nice and quiet, close to the location we needed and not far from most of the shops. Staff were lovely and helpful, I enquired the week of to change our accomodation needs and due to a cancellation they were able to accommodate our needs really seamlessly.

It was school holiday so the other parks were full. We were pleasantly surprised. Everything was neat and clean. The sites are flat and concrete with beautiful trimmed lawn all around. The staff was very friendly. Booked two days but extended to five.
Great campsite with everything you need 🙌

Lovely and accommodating owners.
Unpowered site was nice and green.
Designated on lead dog exercise area.
Had a lovely few days here. Sweet little budget ensuite cabin. Had all that we needed. Not far from town. Very quiet. Staff friendly and helpful on out of the way attractions

Nice park with plenty of room.
The manager’s were so helpful, it was a pleasure meeting them.
Will definitely stay again

We had a wonderful stay at Acclaim Albany Holiday Park! From the very beginning we were warmly welcomed and immediately felt at home. The whole park is exceptionally clean, well maintained, and everything is perfectly organized. The atmosphere is very family-friendly and you can really feel the care that goes into running this place. We honestly can’t understand the average three-star reviews – for us, everything was just perfect. A place where you can truly relax and feel comfortable – absolutely deserving five stars!
Never recommend for families, it won't be a Holiday for you, unprofessional park management staff

I would not recommend Albany Holiday Park for families. The internal roads are very narrow and there's limited parking , making the park feel congested. Park management staff are soo rude, they spoke very harshly to parents in front of kids , which takes away the whole holiday spirit. With lack of space and unfriendly staff staying here felt stressful rather than relaxing. Better taking place with more external space and welcoming atmosphere.
Good caravan park on the outskirts of Albany. Fairly quiet, basic but all the amenities.
Great spot! Carol was so accomodating and looked after us. Great customer service! Would recommend above and beyond :)
It’s a nice park, not fancy but it’s fine as a base.
Good van sites, water is good.

Great place to stay, friendly management, convenient location close to Coles and service station. Park and Room was neat, tidy and comfortable with everything you could need for a visit to a beautiful part of WA. My children and partner loved our experience and are already planning another trip there in the next few weeks.

This is a pleasant caravan park with facilities like a big camp kitchen and kids playground. Even though it was full over a holiday weekend, it was still quiet and peaceful. The bathrooms were dated but the water pressure was great so no problem there.

This is a budget facility as advertised.  Read current reviews as this Park is under new management.||My pre-booking experience was excellent.  When I arrived, notes had been made about my requirements.  The chalet rate per night was super reasonable.  The chalet had everything I needed; it was very clean, and I had no issues!  The staff member on reception was very accommodating.
Great park, very friendly staff, comfortable accommodation

Spent a few nights in this spot & would definitely return.  The only downside was there was only one working washing machine in the laundry at the time of our visit & our clothes came out of it still dirty, if not more dirty than when they went  in.  Lovely spot otherwise if you don't need to use the rundown laundry facilities.

Very bad location, far from the city and everywhere else. Accamodtions and the facilities are really old and outdated.
The management has a ridiculous attitude, particularly during your stay.
Booked this for my mum and aunties trip to Albany. New owners are very nice and the cabin/park was nice. A lot of thr old negative reviews are for the previous owners. Thumbs up from us

Nice little park for a short stay. The rooms may be a little outdated but kind of took me back to my youth We were only using for sleeping, so the "decor" wasn't an issue...
We got the budget cabin as it suited our needs.
The room had everything we needed, kettle, microwave, toaster, electric stove.
Towels, bedding  toilet paper, soap, all provided..
Beds comfortable,  plenty of space for our needs.
Kids loved the park! As we travelled down with others had a great BBQ area where you could sit, cook and watch the kids.
Not far out of town, but really, not far to anywhere in Albany...
Owner was great! Very welcoming and friendly.
Would stay here again..
Nice cozy budget on site trailer/chalet with hard annex and ensuite. Nothing fancy but had everything we needed for our short stay.

The dirtiest oldest crappiest caravan park I have ever had the misfortune to be in. It was built 80 plus years ago and not a cent spent on it since. Give this a wide berth. This staff were friendly though. No services were available the cable gate didn’t work. Toilets and showers dreadful

This place is perfect. Quiet and very neat. Amenities little dated but clean as. Grass areas, concrete slabs for the vans.
Very good camp kitchen with gas, TV, wood fire etc.
Well worth the stop.

Cheap (which is what I was after), but it shows. There have been additions to this park over the years, but I doubt there's ever been a remodel of original structures.

The service was extremely helpful in accommodating my late checkin.

We just spent 8 nights here in a powered site with our caravan and are so glad we did. This place is such a great place to stay. Kate and Les are lovely and have done an amazing job with this spot. We didn't see it prior to them taking over six months ago and I'm glad we didn't as we probably wouldn't have come back going by what they told us it was like prior to them taking over but now it's an awesome family holiday park. |The amenities are tidy and very well kept, the playground is a perfect spot for the kids, the camp kitchen and bbq area is on point and the location is perfect. |Cleaners and yard maintenance crew are constantly working, keeping the place looking amazing and our girls made some awesome new friends during our stay. |We look forward to coming back to stay again and can't wait to see what else Les and Kate have done by then. |Thanks again so much guys. |From the Pierson's
Enjoyed our stay with grandson.  Our site was shady and close to all needed amenities. Quiet park. Will stay again when in the area.

Very dated and run down. Showers are broken, bathrooms dirty and no dump point. Thefts reported in the park. Unfortunately there is not much positive to say about this caravan park. We left a day early.
Nice place to rest.
Very well done in the rooms very clean and tidy and the were so nice to us  👍
Beautiful stay, warm and friendly staff. For being so close to Albany highway, no traffic noise. Pet friendly. Stayed in the family cabin, great price, and comfortably slept 5.

If you're planning a trip to Albany, this is where you'll want to stay, a five star experience start to finish!

The grounds of the campsite promise a peaceful stay with lucious greenery at every turn, exactly as I'd hoped our experience in Albany would be. The amenities were pristine with lovely hot showers with perfect water pressure. We used the camp kitchen which was clean and had everything we needed - with the bonus of beautiful surroundings. The staff were friendly, accomodating and this really reflected on the overall "vibe" of the campsite and the people who were also staying there.

We had to leave the first caravan park we booked shortly after arriving, and weren't sure if we'd find another on such short notice. We phoned up Albany caravan park and the staff went over and above to save our night (out of hours). They gave us a warm welcome, a listening ear, a beautiful quiet spot to park up, thanks to these guys our night went from a potential 1/10 to a 10/10 fast!

Thank you Albany Caravan park! We'll be back ☺️

New management made our stay very enjoyable.  The staff were friendly & obliging. Amenities clean. We had a peaceful & relaxing few days.  All  sites have grass with trees for shade.  No traffic noise. There is also a huge grassed area to exercise your dog. And there is a playground for the kids. We will be back!
Floor sticky with dirt, torn curtains, broken blinds, no kitchen towels, TV no reception, dirty patio etc
